## Checklist

- [ ] I worked only inside my assigned module.
- [ ] I pulled latest `develop` before starting.
- [ ] Code follows WordPress Coding Standards.
- [ ] Inputs are sanitized.
- [ ] Outputs are escaped.
- [ ] Capability checks are included where needed.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are logged.
- [ ] I tested locally.
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed.
